text.message: Jeez I just saw wheat port
can I take that trade back orange
Orange has a longer road to 10 stop
army, 2 settlement spots, excellent production, idk u both are strong
Who ever we don’t steal from will win
If he gets a city we can agree it’s him
orange out of settlements, no ore
He’s on the best ore in the game
lol I ain’t trading with either of you
Sorry bro I need them too
If you don’t block or steal from Orange
He gets a city with wheat port
You’re sitting on army with 2 devs
Well worry about the city when it happens
Then stop blocking our only resource
Why not try to break it?
Sorry we don’t just give you the game
Use one of those non VPs to stop him
We can agree it’s not me anymore
He has one card and you have devs
fax red ur position is very strong
Ok so he wins in 1 turn
lol if I roll a 7 I’ll steal from them
